component.name: ZCode
component.summary: Simple, fast, vibe-ready — the official harness for GLM-5.2
简单、迅捷、氛围十足 — GLM-5.2 官方适配开发工具

description.p: ZCode is an AI coding harness from Z.ai, built around the GLM-5.2 model family. It combines powerful AI agents with your existing toolchain so you can plan, code, review and ship without leaving your flow.
This is an unofficial Flatpak packaging of ZCode for Linux. The upstream application binary is provided as-is by Z.ai; this repository only wraps it for installation under Flatpak.

ul.li: Optimize the Wiki generation capability of the codebase while supporting multiple languages.
Markdown tables now support better horizontal scrolling.
Fixed the exception caused by the workspace being unavailable at startup.
Fixed the residual issue after plugin installation and synchronization failure.
Fixed the issue where recovery was not possible when login authorization encountered an exception.
Fixed the issue where unclear prompts or selection loss occurred when the model was unavailable.
Fixed the issue where custom models were not retained after a restart.
Fixed abnormal quick operations such as chat search and history switching.
Fixed the issue where the file tree fails to refresh or displays incorrect status.
Fixed the scrolling direction and boundary issues of Markdown tables.
Fixed the issue where the timing and control buttons for background tasks were missing.
Fixed an issue where the SQL diff preview might crash.
Fixed the display issue of icons and title bar on Linux.
Fixed the issue where unread markers would be lost after a restart.
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
(see upstream release notes)
Improved plan mode exit so it returns to the previously selected permission mode.
Fixed occasional freezes or duplicate prompts in search and interaction requests.
Fixed inconsistent wording in task notifications.
Fixed the sidebar upgrade flow not returning to the original workspace after closing.
Fixed chat briefly continuing to show loading after a goal completes.
Fixed terminal input sometimes duplicating spaces.
Fixed some remote capabilities not taking effect promptly after app updates.
